prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类招生专业中 ，计算机类（对应计算机科学与技术A-）社会热度“推荐”；电子信息类热度“高热推荐”；海洋科学/海洋技术等特色；本省2026年物理类考生估算约25.2万人， 较2025年24.98万人略有增加；省控线2025年物理类本科批426分，较2024年437分下降11分，竞争环境略有缓和；中国海洋大学位于山东青岛，属沿海985高校， 对湖北考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在湖北物理类招生计划从2025年65人扩至2026年85人，扩招幅度约30.8%。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10212 → 10779 → 13191 → 18563 → 13442, with significant fluctuations; an abnormal drop occurred in 2024 (18563), and a sharp recovery to 13442 in 2025, indicating a rebound in application popularity for this university; provincial Physics Category enrollment plans were 59 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 67 in 2023, 68 in 2024, and 65 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 85, an expansion of about 30.8% compared to 2025, a notable increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 51st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 5 places from 56th in 2025, with continuous improvement; no significant negative public opinion about this university in the 2026 reputation documents; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (21st overall), with topics such as Antarctic seawater included in admission letters attracting attention, indicating moderate to high application interest; Marine Science A+, Aquaculture A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-; Marine Science is a top national discipline, with corresponding admission majors like Marine Science (Lanmeng Top Talent Experimental Class), strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Physics Category admission majors, Computer Class (corresponding to Computer Science and Technology A-) has a social popularity rating of 'recommended'; Electronic Information Class is 'highly recommended'; Marine Science/Marine Technology and other specialties; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in this province for 2026 is about 252,000, a slight increase from 249,800 in 2025; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, down 11 points from 437 in 2024, indicating a slightly eased competitive environment; Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, a coastal 985 university with some cross-provincial appeal to Hubei examinees; its enrollment plan in Hubei for Physics Category expands from 65 in 2025 to 85 in 2026, an increase of about 30.8%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13442, the significant 30.8% expansion of the 2026 Physics Category plan, the rise in Soft Science ranking, moderate to high Douyin popularity, and a slight increase in Physics Category examinees, along with the intensified competition from increased examinees and popularity rebound, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 15974, with a range of 15474–16474.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 2031 → 2455 → 2604 → 2740 → 2690, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 660 positions in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2690, slightly higher than 2024.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial History Category plan was 20 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 17 in 2024, and further reduced to 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 22 students, an expansion of about 46.7% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 51st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 5 places from 56th in 2025, showing steady improvement; there was a negative record in 2023 where a minor language major dropped 6211 positions, but no significant negative public opinion about the university in the 2026 reputation documents; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 21st), with topics like admission letters including Antarctic seawater generating some exposure, and application attention is moderately high; Marine Science A+, Aquaculture A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, totaling 4 A- or above disciplines; Marine Science and Aquaculture are top in the country, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, a coastal 985 university with some cross-provincial appeal to Hubei candidates; its History Category enrollment plan in Hubei expands from 15 students in 2025 to 22 in 2026, a significant increase; among History Category majors, Chinese Language and Literature (subject evaluation: Chinese Language and Literature A-) has a social popularity of 'recommended'; Journalism and Communication has a social popularity of 'clearly discouraged'; Financial Management/International Economics and Trade correspond to finance/economics categories with 'differentiated wait-and-see' popularity; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Hubei in 2026 is about 141,000, roughly the same as 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 442 points, up 10 points from 432 in 2024, indicating a slightly tighter competitive environment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2690, the significant 46.7% expansion of the 2026 History Category plan easing competition, the rise in Soft Science ranking, medium-high Douyin popularity, and a slight increase in the provincial control line, considering the competition relief effect from expansion, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 3413, with a range of 2913–3913.
